title: Dollars for a Fast Gun
writer: Sergio Donati, Joaquín Luis Romero Marchent
actors: Robert Hundar, Pamela Tudor, Luigi Pistilli
plot: In a desert region, Martin, bound to a wheelchair, is served by a gang of bandits to collect rents and kill anybody who resists. Then Lassiter arrives, telling Martin that he knows where Frank is, the man who made him a cripple.
